name: Hexxagon
author: AGP
description: Hexxagon, the hexagonal Ataxx variant. A hexagon-of-hexes (side 5, 61 cells) with 3 blocked holes near the center, leaving 58 playable hexes. Each player starts with 3 pieces on alternating corners. Move one of your pieces onto an empty hex: clone into an adjacent hex (grow, keeping the original) or jump to a hex two away (relocating). Every opponent piece next to where you land is infected and flips to your colour. A player with no move passes; when neither side can move (or the board is full) the player with more pieces wins, equal counts draw. Wiping out the opponent auto-fills the board for the survivor.
